channel.title: AI PM Course Changelog
channel.description: Freshness and curriculum updates for AI PM Course alumni

item.title: AI PM Course: Normalized Module 8.5 storage keys
item.description: MODULE 8.5 · Storage Runtime · metadata — Replaced legacy persisted key prefix 8.5-* with 8-5-* to prevent storage-key fragmentation in future migrations.

item.title: AI PM Course: Added lesson freshness badges and automation
item.description: GLOBAL · Freshness System · freshness re-verify — Introduced deterministic freshness status for each lesson and extended weekly CI to generate freshness reporting outputs.

item.title: AI PM Course: Integrated Micro-Teams 2026 executive reading
item.description: MODULE 12 · 12.2 / 12.6 / 12.7 · content — Added curated supplementary reading, graded analysis framing, and a 90-day pilot template for executive-track learners.
